revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
Navigation sidebar for articles related to the [[Confucianism]].
== Usage == Insert {{tld|Confucianism}} near the top of the article.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:Religion and belief sidebar templates]] [[Category:China religion templates]] [[Category:Confucianism-related templates| ]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Confucianism%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Confucianism%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
Navigation sidebar for articles related to the [[:en:Confucianism|Confucianism]].
== Usage == Insert {{tld|Confucianism}} near the top of the article.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES HERE, THANKS --> }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
